title: Aisszhao 6 Pack Christmas Party Crackers,Christmas Crackers with Santa's Friends Building Block Xmas Cracker,Luxury Xmas Family Cracker with Novelty Gifts Party Hats
features: 🪅【Every Crackers Counts】: Complete with a Hat, Joke/Motto, and handpicked gifts,ensuring a surprises at every pull out. 💌No Snap inside the Candy Paper Box💌

🪽【Surprises Gifts】: The six Christmas crackers are full of surprises. 6 paper crowns, 6 joke sheets, 2 mini pull back cars, 2 Deformed pull back dinosaur eggs, 2 pull back animals car, 1 metal pull back cars, 1 wooden whistle, and 1 fingertip skateboard.Wow, a magical Christmas present! Every pull promises a world of wonder！！
❄️【Size】:Approximate cracker length: 10-inches. Approximate box dimension: Height 30.5cm; Width 30.5cm; Depth 5.5cm
🫎【Christmas Holiday Decorations】:Bring the classic Christmas Crackers to your festive table,but also can be hung on the Christmas tree. Lovely crackers for all the family.

🍭【Reuse Continues Happiness】:Paper environmentally friendly packaging, if not Pull broken, you can open the box, put in your favorite small gifts, can also be small cookies, to your family to create a different Christmas surprise!🌲【Service】: If you have any questions, please contact us in time, we will give you the most satisfactory answer and solution in time.
